candidate_definition_hints.text: ⛓️‍💥 VirtualPet is an all-in-one app that integrates features like AI-powered interactive offline chat, image generation, OCR capabilities, an AI-powered code editor, a built-in web browser, a mini video player, shortcut management, and access to public anime content for local viewing and much more, all within a seamless user interface.

source_repo_description: ⛓️‍💥 VirtualPet is an all-in-one app that integrates features like AI-powered interactive offline chat, image generation, OCR capabilities, an AI-powered code editor, a built-in web browser, a mini video player, shortcut management, and access to public anime content for local viewing and much more, all within a seamless user interface.
